meaning: n.信福音主义者adj.福音(书),新教会的
examples: With almost evangelical fervour, Markman warns against sunbathing.
Even within the evangelical community, however, there are significant differences of outlook on questions of doctrine.
Perhaps more surprising, Mr. Romney's Mormon religion doesn't seem to be turning off evangelical voters.
Of course, much of the resentment centers on the young star's outspoken association with evangelical Christianity.
